title: Reproduce EWSR1-FLI1 expression signature
context: Reproducing a well-cited, open EWSR1-FLI1 expression signature is a replication exercise, NOT a novel-discovery or clinical-evidence claim (PLAN §8 M2). Framing discipline is binding. Binding guardrails: open-access / aggregate / de-identified data only; controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA/biobanks) and identifiable patient data are out of scope; COSMIC/OncoKB/MSigDB-restricted are recipe-reference only; no clinical/diagnostic/prognostic/treatment language; research-only, not medical advice; provenance on every assertion.
objective: Reproduce (or document discrepancy with) a well-cited open EWSR1-FLI1 expression signature, reporting a concordance metric and explicit limitations.
acceptanceCriteria: A well-cited, open EWSR1-FLI1 signature is reproduced (or its discrepancy documented) with a concordance metric and explicit limitations.
Framed as reproduction/replication, not novel discovery or clinical evidence.
Every result traces to a provenance manifest; signature source license respected.
